sections.title: If the player attempts to enter hole before speaking to the Knight
Trying to talk to the knight after receiving his notes

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you? What are you doing here in the snow?

lines.speaker: Knight
lines.text: My name is...Sir Gerry. I am...a member of a secret...society of knights. My time is short and I need...your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A secret society of knights? What a surprise! Is there an old charter or decree that says if you're a knight you have to belong to a secret order?

lines.speaker: Knight
lines.text: I'm sorry, my friend... I do not understand your meaning. Please, time is short... Take this scroll to Sir Tiffy. You will find him in Falador park... You should not...read it... It contains information for his eyes only.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A secret society of knights? You don't mean the Temple Knights, do you?

lines.speaker: Knight
lines.text: Yes! Praise Saradomin! You...have been sent in...my hour of need. Please, take...this scroll to Sir Tiffy in Falador park... You should not...read it.
